text.message: I think I'll go for the 8-4
Not sure why OJ is hating on me
Sorry, but you know i wanted that spot
i know its not because of you
Since i put the road that direction first
yeah but it was my only option for some kind of chance this game
I had to take one of the spots blue. I thought you guys need the 8-4 more and I didn't want everyone to just rob me so took a different spot
its crazy, as 8 hasn't rolled as well
Ill give you the port blue
Just mention it since you stole from me
don't know how that is toxic
yeah i see, but where did my wheat go
yeah but trading you doesn't seem good
don't see why red was trading you the 1:!
